interview_sessions_turn_lease_complete.name: interview_sessions_turn_lease_complete
interview_sessions_turn_lease_complete.value: ("interview_sessions"."turn_lease_id" is null and "interview_sessions"."turn_lease_version" is null and "interview_sessions"."turn_lease_claimed_at" is null and "interview_sessions"."turn_lease_expires_at" is null) or ("interview_sessions"."turn_lease_id" is not null and "interview_sessions"."turn_lease_version" is not null and "interview_sessions"."turn_lease_claimed_at" is not null and "interview_sessions"."turn_lease_expires_at" is not null)

interview_sessions_completion_valid.name: interview_sessions_completion_valid
interview_sessions_completion_valid.value: ("interview_sessions"."status" = 'completed' and "interview_sessions"."completed_at" is not null) or ("interview_sessions"."status" <> 'completed' and "interview_sessions"."completed_at" is null)

node_generations_scope_references_valid.name: node_generations_scope_references_valid
node_generations_scope_references_valid.value: ("node_generations"."generation_scope" = 'trial' and "node_generations"."trial_segment_id" is not null and "node_generations"."strategy_draft_version_id" is not null and "node_generations"."strategy_version_id" is null) or ("node_generations"."generation_scope" = 'formal' and "node_generations"."trial_segment_id" is null and "node_generations"."strategy_draft_version_id" is null and "node_generations"."strategy_version_id" is not null)

node_generations_completion_valid.name: node_generations_completion_valid
node_generations_completion_valid.value: ("node_generations"."status" in ('ready', 'failed', 'superseded') and "node_generations"."completed_at" is not null) or ("node_generations"."status" in ('queued', 'generating', 'retrying') and "node_generations"."completed_at" is null)

normalization_attempts_completion_valid.name: normalization_attempts_completion_valid
normalization_attempts_completion_valid.value: (("normalization_attempts"."status" = 'running' and "normalization_attempts"."completed_at" is null) or ("normalization_attempts"."status" in ('succeeded', 'failed', 'abandoned') and "normalization_attempts"."completed_at" is not null))

normalization_attempts_finish_binding_co.name: normalization_attempts_finish_binding_complete
normalization_attempts_finish_binding_co.value: ("normalization_attempts"."script_sha256" is null and "normalization_attempts"."output_inventory_sha256" is null and "normalization_attempts"."validator_version" is null and "normalization_attempts"."validation_report_sha256" is null) or ("normalization_attempts"."script_sha256" is not null and "normalization_attempts"."output_inventory_sha256" is not null and "normalization_attempts"."validator_version" is not null and "normalization_attempts"."validation_report_sha256" is not null)

normalization_attempts_host_binding_comp.name: normalization_attempts_host_binding_complete
normalization_attempts_host_binding_comp.value: ("normalization_attempts"."host_output_inventory_sha256" is null and "normalization_attempts"."host_validator_version" is null and "normalization_attempts"."host_validation_report_sha256" is null) or ("normalization_attempts"."host_output_inventory_sha256" is not null and "normalization_attempts"."host_validator_version" is not null and "normalization_attempts"."host_validation_report_sha256" is not null)

normalization_attempts_succeeded_gate_va.name: normalization_attempts_succeeded_gate_valid
normalization_attempts_succeeded_gate_va.value: "normalization_attempts"."status" <> 'succeeded' or ("normalization_attempts"."host_output_inventory_sha256" is not null and "normalization_attempts"."host_validator_version" is not null and "normalization_attempts"."host_validation_report_sha256" is not null and "normalization_attempts"."blocking_error_count" = 0)

normalization_attempts_hashes_valid.name: normalization_attempts_hashes_valid
normalization_attempts_hashes_valid.value: "normalization_attempts"."source_epub_sha256" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$' and ("normalization_attempts"."script_sha256" is null or "normalization_attempts"."script_sha256" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$') and ("normalization_attempts"."output_inventory_sha256" is null or "normalization_attempts"."output_inventory_sha256" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$') and ("normalization_attempts"."validation_report_sha256" is null or "normalization_attempts"."validation_report_sha256" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$') and ("normalization_attempts"."host_output_inventory_sha256" is null or "normalization_attempts"."host_output_inventory_sha256" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$') and ("normalization_attempts"."host_validation_report_sha256" is null or "normalization_attempts"."host_validation_report_sha256" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$')

normalization_runs_completion_valid.name: normalization_runs_completion_valid
normalization_runs_completion_valid.value: (("normalization_runs"."status" = 'running' and "normalization_runs"."completed_at" is null) or ("normalization_runs"."status" in ('completed', 'failed') and "normalization_runs"."completed_at" is not null))

reading_setup_operations_lease_complete.name: reading_setup_operations_lease_complete
reading_setup_operations_lease_complete.value: ("reading_setup_operations"."lease_id" is null and "reading_setup_operations"."lease_claimed_at" is null and "reading_setup_operations"."lease_expires_at" is null) or ("reading_setup_operations"."lease_id" is not null and "reading_setup_operations"."lease_claimed_at" is not null and "reading_setup_operations"."lease_expires_at" is not null)

reading_setup_operations_result_valid.name: reading_setup_operations_result_valid
reading_setup_operations_result_valid.value: ("reading_setup_operations"."status" = 'completed' and (("reading_setup_operations"."kind" = 'strategy_revision' and "reading_setup_operations"."result_strategy_draft_version_id" is not null and "reading_setup_operations"."result_trial_revision_id" is null) or ("reading_setup_operations"."kind" = 'trial_selection' and "reading_setup_operations"."result_strategy_draft_version_id" is null and "reading_setup_operations"."result_trial_revision_id" is not null))) or ("reading_setup_operations"."status" <> 'completed' and "reading_setup_operations"."result_strategy_draft_version_id" is null and "reading_setup_operations"."result_trial_revision_id" is null)

strategy_change_proposals_confirmed_vali.name: strategy_change_proposals_confirmed_valid
strategy_change_proposals_confirmed_vali.value: "strategy_change_proposals"."status" <> 'confirmed' or ("strategy_change_proposals"."confirmed_at" is not null and "strategy_change_proposals"."resulting_strategy_version_id" is not null)

trial_revisions_published_valid.name: trial_revisions_published_valid
trial_revisions_published_valid.value: "trial_revisions"."status" not in ('published', 'adopted') or "trial_revisions"."published_at" is not null

user_books_delete_window_complete.name: user_books_delete_window_complete
user_books_delete_window_complete.value: ("user_books"."deleted_at" is null and "user_books"."purge_after" is null) or ("user_books"."deleted_at" is not null and "user_books"."purge_after" is not null and "user_books"."purge_after" > "user_books"."deleted_at")

user_books_trial_pointers_present.name: user_books_trial_pointers_present
user_books_trial_pointers_present.value: "user_books"."workflow_status" not in ('trial_generating', 'trial_generation_failed', 'trial_review') or ("user_books"."current_strategy_draft_version_id" is not null and "user_books"."current_trial_revision_id" is not null)
